sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9925" key="a)ntidu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιδύνω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n9925.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">set opposite to, Intr.Arat.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0023.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.328" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.328</biblScope> </bibl> Maass.</sense> </entryFree>
